items.title: 2 Reasons to Like AMGN and 1 to Stay Skeptical
items.description: Although Amgen (currently trading at $299.86 per share) has gained 9.6% over the last six months, it has trailed the S&P 500’s 29.3% return during that period. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

items.title: Weight Loss Drugs Market Set to Reach USD 50.26 Billion by 2032, Driven by Prescription Drug Adoption and Breakthrough Formulations – SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The global Weight Loss Drugs Market is projected to grow from USD 2.76 Billion in 2024 to USD 50.26 Billion by 2032, with a 43.73% CAGR, driven by increasing obesity prevalence, regulatory approvals, and breakthrough drug formulations.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Expanded Wegovy distribution network and leading in innovative weight loss drug formulations
Received FDA priority review for new once-weekly GLP-1 formulation targeting obesity
Announced promising Phase II trial results for novel oral weight loss drug
Initiated late-stage trials for dual receptor agonist with potential market impact

items.title: 3 Dividend-Paying ETFs to Double Down On Even if the S&P 500 Sells Off in October
items.author: Selena Maranjian
items.description: The article discusses three dividend-focused ETFs that offer potential income and price appreciation, highlighting their benefits during market volatility and as a strategy for long-term investment.
